g.text: Checks: initiator.mayPerform contains grant AND initiator in target.accessible
Pre1: ABO/Rh data available, Pre2: authorized user, Pre3: database not empty
Must have at least one compatible unit
Request recorded with matched units, incompatible excluded
State transition: pre != post, goals achieved
Body includes requestId and list of compatible blood units
- initiator must be authorized for target (TransfusionRequestDatabase)
All channels use TLS 1.2+ encryption and authentication
